description: CompositionOrange printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a split neckline with an insert, three quarter embroidered sleeves, lacing around the neckline, pleats on the front and a vented hemFitRegularWash careWash separately in cold water using a mild detergentCrafted from soft fabric, this kurta from aneri is sure to offer exemplary comfort. Team it with leggings, sandals and chunky ethnic earrings.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
